hero.eyebrow: Palm grove camping, 5 minutes from the village
hero.title: Comfortable camping with a calm desert-side feeling.
hero.body: Camping Tissirt is a quiet place near Errachidia for tents, caravans, and room stays, with a restaurant, clean hot showers, free Wi-Fi, and a warm welcome from Hassan and Ali.

stats.roomsText: For guests who prefer fixed comfort on site.
stats.wifiText: Useful internet access without losing the calm feel.
stats.showersText: Very clean, spacious sanitary comfort included.

hero.overlayTitle: A secure and peaceful base in the palm grove.

overview.title: A small-scale campsite that feels relaxed from the moment you arrive
overview.body: Camping Tissirt is designed for travelers who want peaceful nights, clean facilities, and practical comfort. The campsite welcomes tents and caravans, with hot showers, electricity, free Wi-Fi, homemade bread on order, a secure place to stay, and easy access to the village.
features: Pretty little campsite closed in a palm grove
Excellent welcome from Hassan and Ali
Village only 5 minutes away on foot

reviewsSection.title: What visitors say about Camping Tissirt
reviewsSection.body: Real visitor impressions about the welcome, the palm grove atmosphere, the clean facilities, and the calm of the campsite.

servicesSection.title: Everything needed for an easy camping stay
servicesSection.body: The site focuses on the essentials: a clean setting, practical comfort, friendly people, and the kind of small services that make travelers want to stay longer.

items.title: Sanitary comfort
items.text: Very clean sanitary blocks with hot, spacious showers included in the stay.

items.title: Electricity
items.text: Power access is available for a practical and comfortable camping setup.

items.title: Free Wi-Fi
items.text: Wireless internet is available on site for guests.

items.title: Restaurant & snacks
items.text: Restaurant service, snacks, and homemade bread available on order.

items.title: Secure place
items.text: A calm and secure place for campers, caravans, and travelers stopping in the region.

items.title: Walks & hiking
items.text: Beautiful walks nearby and hiking available based on demand.

staySection.title: For tents, caravans, and room stays
staySection.body: Camping Tissirt works well for independent campers, road travelers, and guests who want a room on site. The atmosphere stays small-scale and welcoming rather than crowded.

items.title: Tent pitches
items.text: A simple, pleasant base for travelers crossing the region with their own camping setup.

items.title: Caravan welcome
items.text: Suitable for caravans looking for a calm stop with services and easy village access.

items.title: Four on-site rooms
items.text: For guests who prefer more fixed comfort while staying in the same natural setting.

roomsHome.heading: Rooms On The Property
roomsHome.sub: Camping Tissirt also offers on-site rooms for guests who want more fixed comfort while staying in the same calm setting.

roomsPage.title: Our Rooms
roomsPage.intro: Discover the rooms available directly at Camping Tissirt for a comfortable stay on the property.

double.title: Room 01
double.desc: Room 01 is one of the on-property guest rooms available for travelers who want a fixed room stay instead of camping.

triplePool.title: Room 02
triplePool.desc: Room 02 offers another on-site room option for guests looking for a simple and comfortable stay on the property.

juniorSuite.title: Room 03
juniorSuite.desc: Room 03 highlights another room available directly at Camping Tissirt for visitors who prefer indoor accommodation.

familySuite.title: Room 01
familySuite.desc: This room listing uses the Room 01 photo set as an additional on-property room option in the current gallery.

restaurantSection.title: Eat on site without leaving the calm of the camp
restaurantSection.body: The restaurant adds real convenience to the campsite. Guests can also order snacks and homemade bread, making it easy to settle in after arrival and enjoy the day at a slower pace.

cards.title: On-site meals
cards.text: Restaurant service directly at the camp for residents and passing travelers.

cards.title: Homemade bread
cards.text: Fresh bread can be prepared on order, a useful and welcoming touch for campers.

cards.title: Good base for walking days
cards.text: After local walks or hiking on demand, guests can return to showers, food, Wi-Fi, and a quieter palm grove atmosphere.

galleryPreview.title: A first look at the place
galleryPreview.body: A dedicated gallery page keeps all images in one place, while the homepage stays focused on the main information visitors need.

galleryPage.heading: Gallery
galleryPage.heroBody: A dedicated visual tour of the campsite, its palm grove atmosphere, its calm corners, and the practical comfort that makes it easy to stop and stay.
galleryPage.moodText: Quiet, airy, and comfortable to the eye.
galleryPage.useText: Open any image to browse the full set in the lightbox.

locationSection.title: Easy to find, easy to settle into
locationSection.body: The campsite is located near Errachidia in a palm grove setting, with the village reachable in around five minutes on foot. It works well as a stop for travelers exploring the region or looking for a calm base for beautiful walks.

footerSection.title: Reserve your stay directly with Camping Tissirt
footerSection.body: For tents, caravans, rooms, restaurant information, or walking requests, contact the campsite directly and get the details you need quickly.
footerSection.detailsBody: Clean showers, electricity, free Wi-Fi, snacks and homemade bread on order, and a secure place for a calm stay in the palm grove.
